column1: # Structural-debt ratchet budgets. Each listed file's line count and unsafe-site
# count must not exceed its recorded ceiling; check-refactor-budgets.sh enforces
# this. Lower a ceiling only after an extraction actually reduces the file; never
# raise one. Seeded 2026-07-22 at the pre-refactor baseline.
# NOTE ON AGGREGATE HONESTY: extracting code from lib.rs into a sibling module
# does NOT reduce total crate lines — module headers, imports, re-export shims,
# and test-module wrappers add boilerplate. Every extracted module must be added
# here at its real size, so a pure move can never look like a reduction. The win
# of an extraction packet is ownership and review boundaries, not line count.
# Likewise, unsafe sites moving from lib.rs into platform/* is not a reduction.
